codeReview.summary: The round-2 cleanup patch fixes the blocker from `fix-agent-scoop-visibility`: bridge scoops are now deleted from `this.tabs`, `this.scoops`, and `this.messageQueues` before the terminal `onStatusChange(jid, 'ready')` callback fires, so both scoop-list refresh paths re-read an already-clean registry. The new cleanup-ordering tests plus the still-passing visibility tests cover the original ghost-row failure, so `fix-agent-scoop-visibility` is now re-verified.

sharedStateObservations.observation: `.factory/library/architecture.md` is now stale: it still says bridge-scoop cleanup currently fires the terminal `onStatusChange(jid, 'ready')` before removing the scoop and that a follow-up fix is needed, but commit `ee1e99f` changed `Orchestrator.unregisterScoop()` to remove bridge scoops from the registry first. Future workers reading the library note will be told the opposite of the current implementation.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:100-115 still describes a 'current flow + known cleanup gap'; packages/webapp/src/scoops/orchestrator.ts:364-390 now deletes `tabs`, `scoops`, and `messageQueues` before firing `onStatusChange(jid, 'ready')`; `git show ee1e99f` confirms that reordering.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Manual-smoke guidance around port 5710 is still ambiguous enough that both visibility-related workers skipped a meaningful CDP check when Sliccstart owned the port. Mission AGENTS says to try stopping the existing occupant cleanly first, while the cleanup-ordering feature text says to stop and return if 5710 is already held, so the workers took the conservative path and never exercised the updated bundle on the intended server.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: /Users/trieloff/.factory/missions/094c0314-6896-4f76-bf58-89b7dfee66f4/AGENTS.md:12-15 says to try `lsof -ti :5710 | xargs kill` before returning; .factory/skills/webapp-worker/SKILL.md:94-119 requires manual CDP verification for UI-visible fixes; the handoffs `2026-04-17T17-08-25-334Z__fix-agent-scoop-visibility__02dc7fe8-7969-4d36-8bf3-8a2580c96bb1.json` and `2026-04-17T17-49-15-639Z__fix-agent-scoop-cleanup-ordering__3fd053d9-b422-44d9-82b3-8a4e1cf85ec2.json` both record that Sliccstart on :5710 prevented a meaningful smoke run.

summary: Pass: commit `ee1e99fb815ad2e52febd1898a4056d601b35d8d` resolves the prior blocker by removing bridge scoops from orchestrator state before the terminal cleanup callback, and the original `fix-agent-scoop-visibility` behavior is now re-verified. No blocking code issues remain in the reviewed fix.
